response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the reference songs 'Kinnikuman Go Fight!' and 'Kasuka Sokujitsu'. 2. Reference JSON lyrics are null, so I am relying strictly on audio and burnt-in on-screen lyrics as the primary source for transcription. 3. Video contains full vocal performances for the first two songs; the third song title card appears at the end without vocals starting in this segment. 4. Subtitles are tightly wrapped to vocal audio with precise millisecond timestamps, following the on-screen text for stylistic elements like stylized backing vocals (Uh~, Ha~).

subtitles.original: ああ 果てない夢を追いかけ (Uh~ Uh~ Uh~ Uh~)
subtitles.english: Ah, chasing an endless dream (Uh~ Uh~ Uh~ Uh~)

subtitles.original: スーパーヒーローになるのさ (Ha~)
subtitles.english: I'm going to become a superhero (Ha~)

subtitles.original: キン肉マン Go Fight!
subtitles.english: Kinnikuman Go Fight!

subtitles.original: キン肉マン Go Fight!
subtitles.english: Kinnikuman Go Fight!

subtitles.original: 私は (ドジで) 強い (つもり)
subtitles.english: I am (clumsy) but (I think I'm) strong

subtitles.original: キン肉マン
subtitles.english: Kinnikuman

subtitles.original: 走る (すべる) 見事に (ころぶ)
subtitles.english: Running (slipping) and falling (spectacularly)

subtitles.original: ああ 心に愛がなければ (Uh~ Uh~ Uh~ Uh~)
subtitles.english: Ah, if there's no love in your heart (Uh~ Uh~ Uh~ Uh~)

subtitles.original: スーパーヒーローじゃないのさ (Ha~)
subtitles.english: You're not a superhero (Ha~)

subtitles.original: キン肉マン Go Fight!
subtitles.english: Kinnikuman Go Fight!

subtitles.original: キン肉マン Go Fight!
subtitles.english: Kinnikuman Go Fight!

subtitles.original: ホロレンジャー 生誕3Dヒーローショー
subtitles.english: Holo Rangers: Birthday 3D Hero Show

subtitles.original: 微か仄日
subtitles.english: Kasuka Sokujitsu

subtitles.original: 聞こえないように 俯く体を
subtitles.english: A body looking down so as not to be heard

subtitles.original: 誰か包んで…壊れる前に
subtitles.english: Someone, embrace it... before it breaks

subtitles.original: 弾き出し嘲笑い 瞳を打つ
subtitles.english: Repelling, mocking, hitting the eyes

subtitles.original: 翳への引き金
subtitles.english: The trigger toward the shadows

subtitles.original: 踏み込む強さより 抗う痛みなら
subtitles.english: Rather than the strength to step in, if it's the pain of resisting

subtitles.original: 誰より前で 食らう Conscience
subtitles.english: Consuming conscience ahead of everyone else

subtitles.original: 引き千切られたプライドが 心に巻くブリザード
subtitles.english: Torn pride wraps a blizzard around the heart

subtitles.original: ねえ ここから出してよって 叫んでないの？
subtitles.english: Hey, aren't you screaming "Get me out of here"?

subtitles.original: 埋もれた声は低い空が いつも救ってくれたね
subtitles.english: The low sky always saved the buried voices, didn't it?

subtitles.original: 砕かれた幻想の果て でもまだ終わらせない
subtitles.english: At the end of shattered illusions, I won't let it end yet

subtitles.original: My heart will doubt...?
subtitles.english: My heart will doubt...?

subtitles.original: 悲しみ宿った 花びらに伝う
subtitles.english: Streaming down petals where sadness dwells

subtitles.original: 涙が落ちた 儚き結晶
subtitles.english: Tears fell, fleeting crystals

subtitles.original: 未来さえ試されて 篩にかけて
subtitles.english: Even the future is tested and filtered

subtitles.original: 残った現実
subtitles.english: The reality that remains

subtitles.original: 寡黙に見つめ合う 夕陽はこの鼓動
subtitles.english: Silently staring at each other, the sunset is this heartbeat

subtitles.original: 生かしてくれるだろう 惑う With the truth
subtitles.english: It will keep me alive, wandering with the truth

subtitles.original: 転んだ今日が纏わりつく 萎れた感情伏せて
subtitles.english: Today's stumbles cling to me, hiding withered emotions

subtitles.original: ねえ 早く気づいてよって 叫んでないの？
subtitles.english: Hey, aren't you screaming "Please notice soon"?

subtitles.original: 傾いた視界に淀む 道は見分けられるか
subtitles.english: Can you distinguish the road stagnating in the tilted view?

subtitles.original: ゲームは始まったばかり この世に潜む現在(いま)を
subtitles.english: The game has just begun, the present lurking in this world

subtitles.original: My heart will want...
subtitles.english: My heart will want...

subtitles.original: いらない痛みなんてないんだと 素直な自分足して
subtitles.english: Saying there's no such thing as unnecessary pain, adding my honest self

subtitles.original: ねえ ここまで来たよって 褒めてもいいの？
subtitles.english: Hey, can I praise myself for coming this far?

subtitles.original: 埋もれた声は低い空が いつも救ってくれたね
subtitles.english: The low sky always saved the buried voices, didn't it?

subtitles.original: 砕かれた幻想の果て でもまだ終わらせない
subtitles.english: At the end of shattered illusions, I won't let it end yet

subtitles.original: My heart will believe
subtitles.english: My heart will believe

subtitles.original: 魔法戦隊マジレンジャー
subtitles.english: Mahou Sentai Magiranger
